summary: P1: Projektchat/Build-Handover-Kontext testing completed. Backend: 33/33 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical features verified. All 22 section cards display correctly, section editor modal works, build-handover generation works with Geheimhaltung (startprompt_emergent excluded from markdown), project chat UI functional.

issues: Minor: CORS warning for ipapi.co (non-blocking, geo-location feature)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All 22 PROJECT_SECTIONS defined in domain.py with proper labels
✅ Geheimhaltung implemented: startprompt_emergent excluded from build-handover markdown (server.py line 4456-4457)
✅ Customer endpoint excludes startprompt_emergent from sections (server.py line 4565-4568)
✅ Customer version excludes start_prompt field via MongoDB projection (server.py line 4581)
✅ Section versioning works correctly - version increments on update
✅ Completeness calculation counts only 'review' and 'freigegeben' status sections
✅ Admin UI shows startprompt_emergent marked as '(intern)' with red styling
✅ All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Test projects created with prefix 'TEST_' for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Projektchat/Build-Handover fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH projects, sections CRUD with versioning, review comments, project chat, build-handover generation, version history, completeness check, customer endpoints with Geheimhaltung. Frontend: Projekte nav, project list table with all columns, project detail with 22 section cards, section editor modal, build-handover button and markdown display, project chat input/send. Geheimhaltung verified: startprompt_emergent NOT visible in customer endpoints or build-handover markdown.
